MindWell

read more. remember more. think better.

A reading tracker for students, writers, and lifelong learners. Track books, articles, and podcasts. Capture quotes and notes. Search everything you have ever read, instantly.

Download Here

Who It's For

Built for anyone who reads seriously and wants to remember what they learn.

🏫

Students

Track your reading across courses, capture key quotes for citations, and build a searchable library of everything you have studied. Get citations instantly.

✏️

Writers

Keep notes and quotes from your research in one place. Search across every source when you are writing. Tag by theme, topic, or project.

📚

Lifelong Learners

Track books, articles, and podcasts together. See your reading history, mark progress, and build a personal library that grows with you.

Features

Everything in one place. Nothing you do not need.

Reading Now

Books, articles, and podcasts in one library

Your reading dashboard organizes everything in one view. Books show page-by-page progress. Articles display the publication and date. Podcasts track individual episodes. Below, see what is coming up next and what you have already completed — all at a glance.

Quotes

Capture the lines that stay with you

Save quotes with exact page numbers and tag them by theme — privacy, fairness, data, or whatever matters to you. Browse all your highlights for any work in one scrollable view. Every quote is searchable, copyable, and exportable as a citation.

Notes

Think on the page as you read

Build structured outlines as you read, with linked quotes that appear inline. Switch between Outline, Brainstorm, and Quotes tabs to find the right mode for how you think. Hover over any linked reference to see the full quote in context — page number, tags, and all.

Search

Find anything you have ever read

Search by tag to pull every matching quote across your entire library. Click #data and instantly see every passage you have highlighted on that topic, grouped by source. Results show the page number and tags, with one-click PDF export for papers and study groups.
